title: ExpOrbRecall
description: This mod adds a feature that allows experience orbs to fly towards you on their own, without you having to walk over and pick them up
body:
This mod adds a feature that is both practical and visually appealing. It allows experience orbs outside a certain range to fly towards you, with a beautiful trailing effect behind the orbs. The particle effects for the trail can be customized in the configuration file. It can run on both the server and client 
sides.   

The amount of spawned particles is influenced by Options -> Video Settings -> Particles

![ ExpOrbRecall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36a3d1932ca75857363d78e3174f4c07d51a2382.gif)
